name: Iter19 — Dashboard filter shows empty state message when no reviews match
description: When the user clicks a provider filter button (Gemini or OpenAI) in the History table and no reviews were made with that provider, a clear empty-state message should appear instead of a blank table with no explanation.

planSteps.description: Verify the filter buttons All, OpenAI, and Gemini are visible
If no Gemini reviews exist, verify a meaningful empty-state message appears explaining there are no Gemini reviews — not a completely blank table area with no text
If no OpenAI reviews exist, verify a meaningful empty-state message appears — not a blank area
Verify the full reviews table is restored
